synopsis:
In 22 BBY, a Galactic Republic information bunker becomes the target of the Confederacy of Independent Systems. A force of battle droids and super battle droids, led by a tactical droid hoping to seize important Republic files, marches on the bunker, unaware that it is a decoy set up as a trap by Jedi General Aayla Secura and a squad of clone troopers under Commander Bly.

As the droids advance through a canyon, Bly signals Secura that the enemy has taken the bait. The droids blast into the bunker only to find its data banks empty, and the clones descend by jetpack to attack. While the troopers destroy the droid forces, the tactical droid retreats inside and is confronted by Secura, who decapitates it with her lightsaber before it can trigger the cyberostasis routine that would have wiped its memory. With the droid's data intact, Secura decides to bring its severed head back to her cruiser for a robolobotomy to learn what secrets it holds.
title: The Clone Wars: Headgames
